name: restaurant owners processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For restaurant owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient month-end accounting causes cash flow gaps. We automate the process instead of manual accounting methods or spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient month-end accounting processes leading to cash flow gaps.
